description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a light blue fuselage and wooden-colored wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The upper and lower wings are straight and parallel, connected by black struts, and each wing features a black cross insignia. The nose houses a wooden propeller, and the cockpit is open and situated just behind the propeller, with a single seat visible. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in matching blue with black cross markings. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, giving the plane a classic taildragger stance.
description: A stylized, vintage biplane with blue fuselage, wooden wings, black cross insignia, and an open cockpit. Features a wooden propeller and classic taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the upper and lower wings with cross insignia.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden propeller, open cockpit, and the biplane's dual wing structure with black struts.
description_view_2: Opposite rear three-quarter view, similar to view 0 but from the other side, showing the tail and wing configuration.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the alignment of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings (upper and lower), no winglets, and minimal dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the propeller.
